ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "registered_address" TEXT /* Registered/corporate address of the insurance company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO/CMD of the insurance company */,
  "appointed_actuary" TEXT /* Name of the appointed actuary for the insurance company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (telephone, fax, web address) of the insurance company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the insurance company */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number issued by the regulatory body */,
  "license_issue_date" TEXT /* Date of issue of the license */,
  "license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the license */,
  "regulatory_status" TEXT /* Current regulatory status of the insurance company (Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key personnel */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the insurance company ID */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the key personnel */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the key personnel */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (telephone, fax, web address) of the key personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email ID of the key personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory compliance record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the insurance company ID */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of regulatory compliance (e.g., filing, audit, inspection) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of regulatory compliance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of regulatory compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulatory auditor, insurance company administrator, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_company_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user ID */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the insurance company ID */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the insurance company ID */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_results" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit result */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the insurance company ID */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the insurance company ID */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)
